/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -O3 -std=c++14 -pthread -std=c++0x -std=c++14 -fexceptions -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libfast_lio_map__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libfast_lio_map__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio_map__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/fast_lio_map/msg/detail/pose6_d__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/nvidia/luckrobot/mid360s_ws/build/fast_lio_map: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libfast_lio_map__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
